high_level_description: A sunny summer day at a suburban car wash: three cheerful fairy-tale style cartoon friends are playfully spraying soap and water over a classic orange Datsun 260Z, surrounded by bubbles and rainbow reflections.

style_description.aesthetics: whimsical Saturday-morning cartoon, soft cel-shading, friendly exaggerated proportions, bright summer comedy scene
style_description.lighting: warm golden-hour sunlight, wet reflective pavement, soft bubble highlights
style_description.art_style: clean vector-style cartoon with bold outlines, flat cel-shading, and playful character design

compositional_deconstruction.background: Bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds, a white picket fence, green hedges, and a simple drive-through car wash stall with striped curtains.

elements.desc: A shiny classic orange Datsun 260Z sports car in the center, covered in white soap bubbles and sparkling water droplets.
A cheerful cartoon friend with oversized friendly eyes, wearing a simple summer t-shirt and shorts, holding a soapy sponge and laughing.
A second playful cartoon friend with fairy-tale proportions, wearing casual summer clothes, spraying the car with a garden hose.
A third grinning cartoon friend drying the car with a big soft blue thing in both hands, wearing simple sneakers and a sun visor.
